name: ADC 10 MW AC-MV natural-gas microgrid node
telemetry_domain: D1 (gensets, BESS, switchgear, SCR — Modbus/J1939/DNP3-61850/SunSpec → Redfish bridge)

parameters.value: 5x Cat G3520H (2.5 MW, 4.16 kV, lean-burn, ~44–45% el.), 4 running + 1 N+1
Cummins HSK78G per-position drop-in; ~1.6–1.8 MW @ 60 Hz → ≈6+1=7 units per node; 55 °C ambient rating
parameters.notes: count per node set by actual engine allocation — telemetry model is count-agnostic

parameters.value: AC-coupled, 6 MW 4-quadrant grid-forming PCS / 3 MWh usable, LFP, UL 9540A
BESS PCS forms bus + black-starts; lead genset isochronous backup; others droop-share
4.16 → 13.8 / 34.5 kV (collection voltage TBD, ELEC-004); ~12.5–15 MVA class
per-engine SCR + oxidation catalyst locked; HSK78G native-NOx ≈0.5 g/hp-hr held in reserve
20 nodes = 200 MW under one synthetic-minor air permit; site-specific — nonattainment (Baton Rouge ozone) can break it; PTE must count standby-fleet run-hours (20 N+1 units on ~80 running)
provisional — only if fault study (ELEC-002) requires; meaningful on a 4-machine node
4-unit non-redundant 10 MW variant exists — state which variant on every commercial commitment
